title: Debounced Search Input
description:
Optimize a search component that currently triggers a heavy filter on every keystroke by adding debounce.

### Requirements

- Debounce the search input so filtering only runs after the user stops typing for 300ms
- Show a "Searching…" indicator while the debounce is pending
- Display the number of results found after filtering completes
- The input should update immediately (controlled input) — only the filtering is debounced
- Clearing the input should immediately clear results (no debounce delay)
- Clean up the timeout on unmount

### Test IDs

| Element | data-testid |
|---------|-------------|
| Search input | `search-input` |
| Searching indicator | `searching` |
| Results count | `result-count` |
| Result item | `result-{index}` |
constraints:
- Must use setTimeout/clearTimeout (not a library)
- Input value updates immediately on typing
- Only the filter/display updates are debounced
- Clearing the input resets instantly
- Timeout must be cleaned up on unmount
hints: Use two pieces of state: one for the input value (updates immediately) and one for the debounced value (updates after delay).
Use useEffect with the input value as dependency. Inside, set a timeout. Return a cleanup function that clears it.
Check if the input is empty and skip the debounce — set results immediately.
